text:
(1) The driver of a motor vehicle shall not, in a careless and imprudent manner, drive the vehicle unnecessarily close to, toward, or near a bicyclist.

(2) Any person who violates subsection (1) of this section commits careless driving as described in section 42-4-1402 .
markdown:
## Title 42
#### Article 4. Regul. of Vehicles & Traffic
##### § 42-4-1008.5 — Crowding or threatening bicyclist

(1) The driver of a motor vehicle shall not, in a careless and imprudent manner, drive the vehicle unnecessarily close to, toward, or near a bicyclist.

(2) Any person who violates subsection (1) of this section commits careless driving as described in section 42-4-1402 .

subsections.text: The driver of a motor vehicle shall not, in a careless and imprudent manner, drive the vehicle unnecessarily close to, toward, or near a bicyclist.
Any person who violates subsection (1) of this section commits careless driving as described in section 42-4-1402 .
